programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tells Debra he's not sleeping well because of her being too close to him. He cooks up a story about his granny to get out of touching Debra in a non-sexual way. (S3, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides to go back to her PR job for part-time. She finds a job in Manhattan but gets fired on the very first day. Ray is secretly happy. (S3, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray realize they are nicer to strangers than to each other. They decide to be nicer to their own families. But the situation gets awkward when they are just pretend-nice. (S3, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: On Ray's suggestion, Robert takes Debra swing dancing and they start to love it. Ray becomes a little jealous and tries to break them up, but gets caught. (S3, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Amy get back together and spend a night together in Robert's apartment, but the whole building ends up seeing them from their window. Robert is too embarrassed. (S3, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A flashback to when Ray and Debra first met. Ray is working as a futon delivery guy and he brings her a futon. Ray accidentally sees her naked. Season finale. (S3, E.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss: Rachel accidentally kisses the man interviewing her for a job. Meanwhile, Joey becomes obsessed with a woman living in Ross's apartment building. (S5, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel starts smoking when she realises that her boss and co-workers are all smokers and she's missing out on the benefits that come with their excursions. (S5, E.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: After learning that a stranger has been accidentally killed near their rural homes, four Oregon boys decide to go see the body. On the way, Gordie Lachance (Wil Wheaton), Vern Tessio (Jerry O'Connell), Chris Chambers (River Phoenix) and Teddy Duchamp (Corey Feldman) encounter a mean junk man and a marsh full of leeches, as they also learn more about one another and their very different home lives.

programme.title: The Outsiders

programme.title: Starship Troopers
programme.desc: In the distant future, the Earth is at war with a race of giant alien insects. Little is known about the Bugs except that they are intent on the eradication of all human life. But there was a time before the war... A Mobile Infantry travels to distant alien planets to take the war to the Bugs. They are a ruthless enemy with only one mission: Survival of their species no matter what the cost...

Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

programme.title: Elli and Her Monster Team
programme.desc: A homeless ghost seeking belonging at a Ghost Train draws unwanted outside attention, forcing her and its monster residents to embark on a quest to save their home and her chance at finding family.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programme.title: RuPaul's All Stars Drag Race
programme.desc: All Stars compete for $100,000 and a chance to be inducted into RuPaul's Drag Race Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Four couples and their therapy sessions with psychoanalyst Dr. Orna Guralnik in New York.

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Four couples and their therapy sessions with psychoanalyst Dr. Orna Guralnik in New York.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Singles come together in a tropical location to look for romance, with one couple winning a cash prize.

programme.title: The Iron Claw
programme.desc: The true story of the Von Erich brothers, who, through tragedy and triumph, under the shadow of their domineering father and coach, seek epic immortality on the biggest stage in sports.

programme.title: Meadowlarks
programme.desc: Four siblings, torn apart by the Sixties Scoop, reunite for one week.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: A single mother establishes a high-end escort service that matches beautiful young women with the wealthiest and most powerful men in the city. She manages to keep her lifestyle hidden from her kids and others until the FBI starts to investigate her.

programme.title: Shoresy
programme.desc: The National Senior Tournament begins, and the Bulldogs are hurt.

programme.title: Little jesus
programme.desc: Tells the story of Jean who pins his hopes of recovering from his wounds on a miracle: his ten-year-old son. He is convinced that Loulou is the new Messiah.

programme.title: Mistletoe Time Machine
programme.desc: Three ex-best friends are forced back together when a magical incident sends them back to a pivotal moment in their shared past.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Creed III
programme.desc: Still dominating the boxing world, Adonis Creed is thriving in his career and family life. When Damian, a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy resurfaces after serving time in prison, he's eager to prove that he deserves his shot in the ring. The face-off between former friends is more than just a fight. To settle the score, Adonis must put his future on the line to battle Damian -- a fighte

programme.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
programme.desc: Dr. Kelson makes a discovery that could change the world, while Spike's encounter with cult leader Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: As a future war between the human race and artificial intelligence rages on, ex-special forces agent Joshua is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI. The Creator has developed a mysterious weapon that has the power to end the war and all of mankind. As Joshua and his team of elite operatives venture into enemy-occupied territory, they soon discover the w

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Nope
programme.desc: A man and his sister discover something sinister in the skies above their California horse ranch, while the owner of a nearby theme park tries to profit from the mysterious, otherworldly phenomenon.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Soul on Fire
programme.desc: A tragic accident leaves 9-year-old John O'Leary with burns covering 100% of his body. He soon embarks on a miraculous road to recovery with support from family, the community, and baseball announcer Jack Buck. Grateful for the gift of life, John becomes a motivational speaker who inspires millions of people to make the world a better place.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

programme.title: This Time Each Year
programme.desc: Despite a trial separation, Lauren pretends to still be with her husband, Kevin, to placate her overbearing mother. The ruse may be just what the couple needs to finally work on their marriage.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth.

programme.title: Meadowlarks
programme.desc: Four siblings, torn apart by the Sixties Scoop, reunite for one week.

programme.title: Self Reliance
programme.desc: A man receives an offer to win $1 million by playing a game where he must outwit hunters who are trying to kill him. He soon realizes they can only attack him when he's alone, but none of his friends or family believe the game is real.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: While vacationing at a remote cabin in the woods, a young girl and her parents are taken hostage by four armed strangers who demand they make an unthinkable choice to avert the apocalypse. Confused, scared and with limited access to the outside world, the family must decide what they believe before all is lost.
